title: More Nonsense Limerick 46
content:
There was an old person of Cassel,
    Whose nose finished off in a tassel;
    But they call'd out, "Oh well! 
    Don't it look like a bell!"
    Which perplexed that old person of Cassel.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 46"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
